name: Neon Force Pushers
short_description: Battle your friends in this competitive action platformer by casting concussive waves of energy that push your friends into hazards!
detailed_description: Push your friends into spikes using concussive waves of energy in this chaotic multiplayer platformer! Compete with up to three friends in hectic battles, flinging your opponents and yourself across the game's stages! Take note of your surroundings, each stage has its own hazards and obstacles to incorporate into your attacks and strategies! Will you master your pushing ability or will your friends gain the upper hand?
about_the_game: Push your friends into spikes using concussive waves of energy in this chaotic multiplayer platformer!
